keywords_glossary.Shelter: Opponents must engage this spirit before others when able.
keywords_glossary.Ward: The next harm this spirit would take is softened away.
keywords_glossary.Breeze: This spirit may act the turn it enters play.
keywords_glossary.Mist: Cannot be chosen until this spirit acts.
keywords_glossary.Drift: Only spirits with Drift can intercept this one.
keywords_glossary.Bloom: Restores Calm at end of turn.
keywords_glossary.Whisper: Can influence distant spirits without close engagement.
keywords_glossary.Ripple: When this spirit rests, ease 1 composure from the opponent.
keywords_glossary.Stillness: A spirit in Stillness cannot act until end of turn.
keywords_glossary.Kindness: Redirects an opponent's next engagement elsewhere.
keywords_glossary.Gather: When this spirit enters play, draw a card or gain 1 composure.
keywords_glossary.Tend: Restore Calm to an allied spirit or yourself.
keywords_glossary.Echo: Repeats its gentle effect at end of turn.
keywords_glossary.Rooted: This spirit cannot be moved this turn.
keywords_glossary.Shizukesa: This spirit holds its ground — cannot be displaced while Calm remains.
